title: Ink Email Agent — AI PDF Annotations via Email
description: Email a PDF to an AI agent, get it back annotated with highlights, margin notes, and an executive summary — as if a brilliant study partner already read it. Built with Inkbox.ai for email infrastructure, FastAPI for the webhook server, and Claude for the annotation intelligence. The proprietary Ink pipeline analyzes documents in 3 passes (global scan, per-page annotations, executive summary) and renders annotations directly onto the PDF using ReportLab.
